methodsAttempted.query: site:deusto.es (ChatGPT OR "generative AI" OR "inteligencia artificial generativa" OR "IA generativa" OR "artificial intelligence") (policy OR policies OR guidelines OR normas OR normativa OR estudiantes OR evaluación OR docencia) "Universidad de Deusto"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned the official Deusto AI hub, the March 2024 public positioning PDF, a Deusto Library citation guide, and several news or research pages.
Direct curl requests to robots.txt, the AI hub, and the PDF returned Akamai Access Denied/403 from this environment; Firecrawl opened the same official AI hub and PDF with HTTP 200.
Firecrawl opened the public Deusto Library guide on citing generative AI with HTTP 200.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a central University of Deusto AI strategy/guidance page, the linked March 2024 public positioning PDF, and a Deusto Library citation guide. Direct HTTP access from this worker was blocked by the official host, but Firecrawl retrieved the public sources without requiring login or bypassing access controls.

artifacts.claimText: The University of Deusto has an institutional Artificial Intelligence Commission responsible for defining and coordinating the university's AI strategy, promoting training, establishing good practices, and supporting adoption by the university community.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: La Comisión de Inteligencia Artificial (IA) de la Universidad de Deusto es el espacio institucional encargado de definir y coordinar la estrategia de la universidad en torno al uso de la IA, con una mirada ética, humanista y responsable.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The AI Commission is the institutional space responsible for defining and coordinating Deusto's AI strategy.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Deusto's AI principles state that faculty, students, researchers, and management staff must communicate their use of AI, understand and assume AI-use risks, and respect privacy, confidentiality, and data-protection criteria when using AI.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Todas las personas (profesorado, alumnado, personal investigador y de gestión) deben comunicar el uso de la IA en sus actividades y procesos.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: All faculty, students, researchers, and management staff must communicate their use of AI in activities and processes.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For each Deusto course, students are directed to review the course programme and learning guide for AI-use rules; those rules must be followed, including where AI use is prohibited.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Para cada asignatura, es necesario revisar el programa de la asignatura y la guía de aprendizaje, donde se establecen las pautas sobre el uso de la IA. Estas normas deben cumplirse en todo momento, también cuando el uso de la IA esté prohibido.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For each course, students must review the programme and learning guide where AI-use rules are established, and those rules must be followed.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Deusto's March 2024 AI positioning document states that text or other AI-generated resources may not be used literally and must instead be reviewed, reworked, or completed.

artifacts.claimText: A Deusto Library citation guide states that, at the university, there is currently no generic prohibition or generic permission for using generative AI, and points users who use generative AI in research or academic work to citation information.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: En la Universidad no hay a día de hoy una prohibición o permiso genérico de uso de la inteligencia artificial generativa. Si decides utilizar IAg en una investigación o trabajo académico, en esta página encontrarás información general sobre cómo referenciar su uso en dicho trabajo.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guide says the university currently has no generic prohibition or permission for generative AI use and gives citation guidance if it is used.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow source-status claim about the institutional AI Commission and its role, directly supported by the official AI hub.
Approved as an AI-use principles claim; the claim keeps the original source's disclosure, risk, privacy, confidentiality, and data-protection boundaries.
Approved as a course-scoped claim. It does not infer a university-wide blanket permission or ban and points to course programmes and learning guides.
Approved as a narrow authorship/academic-integrity claim from the official March 2024 AI positioning PDF.
Approved with lower confidence because the source is a Deusto Library citation guide; the claim is scoped to the guide's current generic-permission statement and does not override course-level rules.

artifacts.title: University of Deusto AI Policy Evidence Update
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence for the University of Deusto from official Spanish-language sources: the central AI hub, the March 2024 public AI positioning PDF, and a Deusto Library citation guide. Claims cover Deusto's AI Commission, disclosure/risk/privacy principles, course-level AI-use rules, non-literal use of AI-generated resources, and the library guide's no-generic-permission statement.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Direct HTTP requests to www.deusto.es returned Access Denied/403 from this worker; source content was verified through Firecrawl extraction of public official URLs.
The library-guide claim is lower confidence and should remain scoped to the cited Deusto Library guide unless a stronger central policy source confirms the same wording.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
